title: Directory watcher ingestion
description: Optional [watch] config. Use notify crate for filesystem events on configured path. New files matching pattern (e.g. *.md): read as markdown, render to HTML via pulldown-cmark, sanitize with ammonia, federate as Note. Resolve relative image paths against incoming directory, validate and attach. Move processed files to published/ directory. File path is source_ref for dedup.
close_reason: RSS/Atom poller, webhook endpoint, directory watcher all implemented. Sanitization via ammonia, markdown via pulldown-cmark.
